name: Vanilla Wafer Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the egg and vanilla extract.
3. Gradually combine the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt) with the creamed mixture and mix well until just combined.
4. Drop spoonfuls of dough 2 inches apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
5. Bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes or until the edges are golden brown.
6. Remove from the oven and transfer to a wire rack to cool.
